title: The title provided actually belongs to a paper published in Cell in 2022 (Vol 185) by Barba-Spaeth et al., not the NEJM.
journal_name: The New England Journal of Medicine is a valid journal, but it does not publish structural biology papers with this specific volume and page numbering.
journal_volume: Volume 273 is not corresponding to the year 2021; NEJM volumes in 2021 were 384 and 385.
journal_issue: Issue 26 exists for NEJM but would not match volume 273 for the year 2021.

elocator: No elocator was provided in the citation.
publication_date: The specific date December 23, 2021, is a valid calendar date, but does not correspond to the content or volume cited.
doi: DOI 10.1056/NEJMoa2115926 is a real DOI, but it belongs to a paper about face masks (Talic et al.), not flavivirus epitope arrangement.
pmcid: PMCID PMC8728796 corresponds to a valid paper, but it is the mask study by Talic et al., not the title provided.
pmid: No PMID was provided in the source text.
